captions.visual: A replay shows a hockey player in a black jersey with the number 25 skating with the puck in the offensive zone. He passes it to a teammate, who then shoots. The puck goes into the net past the goalie. The replay is shown from two different angles, first from behind the play and then from a higher, more traditional overhead angle.
captions.audio: speech: Announcer: ...for the Gophers right here. A puck goes in. A good job getting that puck over and a big save on Rep Pittlick.; acoustics: 1) Tone of speech: Excited, play-by-play commentary. 2) Background sounds or music: The sound of skates on ice and the puck being hit.
attributes: camera_state: The camera starts with a high-angle shot from behind the play, then cuts to a higher, more standard overhead angle for the second replay.

video_background: The scene is a professional ice hockey rink during a game. The boards are visible with advertisements for 'Sanford Health' and 'Alerus'. The ice has 'Xcel Energy Center' painted on it.
storyline: This segment provides a replay of a goal scored by the black team, showing the sequence of the play and the save.
shooting_style: This is a montage of two different replay angles of the same goal.

captions.visual: A third replay angle is shown, this time from a camera positioned behind the net. A player in a black jersey skates towards the net, and the puck is deflected off a defender's stick and into the goal. The goalie is on the ice, and the players from the black team celebrate the goal.
captions.audio: speech: Announcer: ...poked that puck over the top of the stick.; acoustics: 1) Tone of speech: Analytical commentary. 2) Background sounds or music: The sound of skates and the puck.
attributes: camera_state: The camera is positioned behind the net, providing a close-up view of the goal and the players' celebration.
video_background: The background is the area behind the hockey net, with the boards and spectators blurred. The ice surface is visible.
storyline: This replay offers another perspective on the goal, highlighting the deflection and the immediate celebration by the scoring team.
shooting_style: This is a single, continuous replay shot from a unique angle.

captions.visual: A replay shows a hockey player in a black jersey with the number 24 skating towards the goal. He takes a shot, and the puck deflects off the stick of a defender in a green jersey, bouncing once before being pushed into the net by the goalie.
captions.audio: speech: as well. And the rebound just to the side of the...; acoustics: 1) Tone of speech: Neutral, descriptive. 2) Background sounds or music: Faint crowd noise.
attributes: camera_state: The camera is positioned high above the ice, providing a wide shot of the goal area. It pans to follow the action.

video_background: The scene is a professional ice hockey rink. Advertising boards for 'Bremer Bank,' 'Rydell,' and 'Sanford' are visible along the boards behind the goal. The 'Vance Thompson Vision' logo is in the lower-left corner.
storyline: This segment begins a replay of a goal scored by the black team, showing the initial shot and the subsequent deflection that resulted in the goal.
shooting_style: This is a replay of a live game play.

captions.visual: The replay continues with a closer view of the puck entering the net. The goalie, wearing a green jersey with the number 32, is on the ice, and the puck slides past him into the empty net.
captions.audio: speech: ...net.; acoustics: 1) Tone of speech: Neutral. 2) Background sounds or music: Faint crowd noise.
attributes: camera_state: The camera zooms in slightly and pans to follow the puck as it goes into the net, focusing on the goalie and the back of the net.
video_background: The background is the ice rink, with the red and blue goal net in the foreground. Other players are visible on the ice around the goal.
storyline: This shot confirms the goal by showing the puck crossing the goal line from a closer perspective.
shooting_style: This is a replay of a live game play.

captions.visual: A replay shows a hockey game from a high angle. A player in a black jersey skates with the puck in the offensive zone, drawing defenders. He passes to a teammate who is checked hard into the boards, falling to the ice. The play continues as the puck is cleared.
captions.audio: speech: Commentator 1: ...call here. Look at some of these chances, Jake. Commentator 2: Uh, just a good job right here. It's a big save, getting close with some of these chances.; acoustics: 1) Tone of speech: Analytical and conversational. 2) Background sounds or music: The distinct sounds of skates on ice and sticks hitting the puck.
attributes: camera_state: The camera is positioned at a high, wide angle, providing a full view of the offensive end of the ice. It pans to follow the action.

video_background: The scene is a professional ice hockey rink. Advertising boards for 'Vortkam' and 'Great Clips' are visible along the boards. The 'Vance Thompson Vision' logo is in the bottom left corner.
storyline: This segment begins a replay analysis of a significant play in a hockey game, focusing on a scoring chance for the black team.
shooting_style: This is a standard live sports broadcast replay.

captions.visual: The replay continues, focusing on the aftermath of the check. The player who was checked is on the ice, and the puck is cleared away from the goal by a player in a white jersey. The goalie, wearing a black mask, is positioned in front of the net.
captions.audio: speech: Commentator 2: ...getting close with some of these chances.; acoustics: 1) Tone of speech: Analytical. 2) Background sounds or music: The sound of skates and sticks on the ice.
attributes: camera_state: The camera remains in a high, wide angle, panning to follow the puck as it is cleared from the offensive zone.
video_background: The ice rink is shown with players from both teams near the goal. The boards and glass are in the foreground, with the 'Vortkam' logo visible on the boards.
storyline: The replay highlights the defensive play by the white team, clearing the puck and preventing a scoring opportunity after the initial check.
shooting_style: This is a standard live sports broadcast replay.
